subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the world calleth out and all are summoned unto God, the Lord of all worlds. Lo, he who hath hearkened is drawn in rapture [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه ینادی العالم و یبشر الکل الی الله رب العالمین ان الذی سمع انجذب
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
